sn35.72:1.0.3: "What do you think, bhikkhu, do you regard the eye thus: ‘This is not mine, this I am not, this is not my self’?"
sn35.72:1.0.5: "Good, bhikkhu! And here, bhikkhu, you should clearly see the eye as it really is with correct wisdom thus: ‘This is not mine, this I am not, this is not my self.’ Thus this first base for contact will be abandoned by you for no future renewed existence.
sn35.72:1.0.6: "Do you regard the ear thus … ? Thus this second base for contact will be abandoned by you for no future renewed existence … .
sn35.72:1.0.9: "Do you regard the mind thus: ‘This is not mine, this I am not, this is not my self’?"
sn35.72:1.0.11: "Good, bhikkhu! And here, bhikkhu, you should clearly see the mind as it really is with correct wisdom thus: ‘This is not mine, this I am not, this is not my self.’ Thus this sixth base for contact will be abandoned by you for no future renewed existence."
